description: You are setting up the POS system for a new convenience store. Import the inventory items from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\inventory_items.csv and organize them into the following categories: Beverages (Coffee Beans 1lb, Green Tea Box, Orange Juice 64oz), Snacks (Trail Mix Bag, Granola Bars 6pk, Potato Chips Family Size), Electronics (USB-C Cable 6ft, Wireless Mouse, Phone Charger 20W), and Stationery (Notebook College Ruled, Ballpoint Pen 10pk, Sticky Notes 3x3). Create a summary file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\category_assignments.txt listing all 12 items in the format: Item Name | Category Name. Use exact spelling for category names.
